overall.description: Gameplay footage from a truck simulator showing a first-person perspective from inside a Mercedes-Benz Actros truck cabin. The player drives through heavy winter conditions on a highway, following another semi-truck into an industrial area with stone walls and warehouses.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered highway with guardrails and road signs

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on snow-covered highway following a semi-truck ahead

green highway exit sign with white text indicating directions
open fields blanketed in snow extending to the horizon
highway overpass bridge ahead spanning the road

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view from a truck cabin driving on a wide, snow-covered highway. The Mercedes dashboard is visible in the foreground with snow accumulating on the windshield. The truck follows a semi-truck ahead while passing highway guardrails and approaching a concrete overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial access road with high stone walls

events.description: entering industrial area with stone retaining walls and warehouse buildings

agents.ego_description: following the lead truck into a narrower industrial corridor with walls on both sides

notable_agents.action: semi-truck moving slowly through the industrial entrance ahead

entered.detail: tall stone walls lining the right side of the industrial road
metal chain-link fence running parallel to the road on the left
large industrial warehouse structures with flat roofs

segments.scene_description: The truck transitions from the open highway into an industrial zone characterized by high stone walls on the right and chain-link fences on the left. The road narrows as the truck follows the lead semi-truck through the industrial entrance, passing warehouse buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with tight turns and warehouses

events.description: navigating a left turn in the industrial area while following the lead truck

agents.ego_description: making a left turn while following the lead truck through the industrial complex

industrial warehouse buildings appearing on the left side

segments.scene_description: The truck navigates through a narrower industrial corridor, making a left turn while maintaining close distance to the lead semi-truck. Stone walls recede into the distance as street lights and additional warehouse structures become visible along the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with warehouse buildings and road barriers

agents.ego_description: continuing through the industrial area on a snow-covered road, maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: semi-truck continuing ahead on the industrial road, kicking up snow

entered.detail: concrete road barriers along the right side of the street
cluster of industrial buildings visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The truck continues driving through the industrial district on a medium-width street lined with warehouse buildings and road barriers. The lead semi-truck remains ahead, navigating the snow-covered asphalt as the industrial complex extends into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it moves from an open, snow-covered highway into a confined industrial district. It begins on a wide road with snow accumulating on the windshield, following a semi-truck past highway guardrails and under a concrete overpass. As the truck leaves the highway, the environment narrows into an industrial zone defined by high stone walls and chain-link fences that flank the route past various warehouse buildings. The scene then shifts as the camera navigates a left turn through a tighter corridor, where the stone walls recede to reveal street lights and further industrial structures. Finally, the truck continues along a medium-width street lined with road barriers and warehouses, following the lead vehicle deeper into the snow-covered complex.
